layout_note: Single-column, built on an implied tile-module grid; sections divided by thin grout-grey rules (the structural signature). Boldness spent on the 'jobs others turn down' angle block and the deep-teal accent; everything else quiet.

sections.copy_intent: Text wordmark 'Kyle Knowles Tiling'; nav: Work, Reviews, Areas; one button 'Get a quote'. No phone in the bar on mobile.
sections.visual_intent: Quiet solid header, grout-grey hairline underneath. Mobile: wordmark + hamburger only (no phone, no >2 links) per mobile_header check.

sections.purpose: State trade + location + the complex-job angle in one line; show real finished work; surface the only citable proof.
sections.copy_intent: Headline = trade-led positioning on the too-complex angle (not a quote). Subhead = difficult floors + intricate work others pass on + 4.9/43 proof. CTAs: Get a quote (primary, #quote), Call (secondary).
sections.visual_intent: Full-bleed best landscape project photo (02-places) under a wet-slate ink scrim for legibility; Bricolage Grotesque headline, deep-teal primary button; small proof chip '4.9 on Google, 43 reviews'.

sections.purpose: The one memorable thing: Kyle takes the jobs other fitters refuse or abandon, and levels the floors no one else will. This is where boldness is spent.
sections.copy_intent: 2-3 short, concrete statements of the specialism, stated plainly and factually (no boast adjectives). Each tied to a real situation: rescue jobs, complex layouts, difficult subfloors.
sections.visual_intent: Stone-grey section, large Bricolage Grotesque statements separated by grout-line rules; deep-teal used once on a key phrase. No icons.

sections.purpose: Name the 3-4 real services from evidence with specific, grounded descriptions.
evidence_anchors: site-strategy.json real_services (floor tiling + levelling, bathroom tiling, kitchen floors/walls, intricate/large-format layouts)
sections.copy_intent: Each service: short label + one evidence-grounded line. NEVER the Google junk categories. NEVER 'X services explained plainly'.
sections.visual_intent: Labelled list (two-letter category marks or plain labels, NOT 01/02/03 - services are not a sequence; NOT SVG icons). Distinct from the numbered process below.

sections.purpose: Show the actual finished tiling - the proof that matters most for a tiler with no third-party profiles.
evidence_anchors: brief.json photos[] (9 completed_project webp, mixed portrait/landscape)
sections.copy_intent: Short section intro; safe captions only (work type + Manchester; no invented job locations or customer names).
sections.visual_intent: CSS masonry: 3 columns >=1024px, 2 columns 640-1023px, 1 column mobile; natural aspect ratios, top-aligned, captions directly under each image (gallery check compliance).

sections.purpose: Exactly one review section. Lead with the rescue/complex quotes that carry the angle.
sections.copy_intent: 3-4 verbatim Google excerpts, attributed 'First name, Google review'. No first name as a headline. One review section only (no duplicate wall).
sections.visual_intent: Quiet cards on surface; the 4.9/43 proof restated once as a stat, label 'Google rating' (no banned sub-labels).

sections.purpose: Reduce risk for someone whose last tradesperson let them down - show the orderly way Kyle works.
evidence_anchors: reviews[1] Luca (kept up to date, expert advice on tiles)
reviews[0] Laura (turned up as promised each day)
reviews[3] Paulo (did not rush, cleaned up daily)
sections.copy_intent: 4 ordered steps grounded in review behaviour: look + honest tile advice -> prep & level -> set out & tile (no rush) -> tidy finish, kept updated.
sections.visual_intent: Numbered 01-04 IS appropriate here (a real sequence, per frontend-design rule). Numerals in Bricolage Grotesque, grout-line dividers between steps.

sections.purpose: Establish locality and availability without exposing the home address.
sections.copy_intent: Covers Manchester and East Manchester (Openshaw, M11) and nearby. Hours 7am-7pm, seven days (sourced). No street address.
sections.visual_intent: Keyless Google Maps iframe centred on 'Manchester M11' (town + outward only); area list + hours beside it.

sections.purpose: Convert: a quote form plus phone, anchored at #quote.
sections.copy_intent: Quote form: name, phone, postcode, job type, details, optional photos. Primary heading specific to Kyle. Phone as secondary. Form is presentational only (does not submit to the business).
sections.visual_intent: Deep-teal panel or accented form; quote-only sticky CTA reveals after hero on scroll, hides near footer.

sections.purpose: Real local-business footer, not just the agency credit.
sections.copy_intent: Brand, phone, areas, hours, quick links, link to read Google reviews. Small 'Website by WebForTrades' credit at the bottom.
sections.visual_intent: Wet-slate ink footer; grout-grey dividers; restrained.

omitted_reasons: Kept lean and evidence-only. No section exists without a specific anchor in the frozen brief.
